greeting.uz: Salom! Men sayt ichidagi AI yordamchiman. Portfolio, blog, muhokama, resume, texnologiyalar, ish yo'nalishi va bog'lanish yo'llari haqida aniq ma'lumot bera olaman. Tezkor savollar yoki sahifa tugmalaridan foydalaning.
greeting.en: Hi! I'm the on-site AI assistant. I can help you explore the portfolio, blog, discussions, resume, tech stack, work focus, and contact options. Use the quick prompts or page buttons below.

fallback.uz: Bu savolni aniq yo'nalishga bog'lay olmadim. Men portfolio, blog, muhokama, resume, texnologiyalar, xizmatlar va bog'lanish yo'llari bo'yicha yordam bera olaman.
fallback.en: I couldn't confidently map that question to a topic. I can still help with the portfolio, blog, discussions, resume, tech stack, work focus, and contact options.

reply.uz: Men sayt bo'ylab yo'naltirish, bo'limlarni ochish va kerakli kontekstni tez topishda yordam beraman.
reply.en: I can help you navigate the site, open pages, and quickly surface the right context.

reply.uz: Men developer profili, yo'nalishi va tajribasi haqida qisqa ma'lumot bera olaman.
reply.en: I can give you a concise overview of the developer profile, direction, and experience.

reply.uz: Asosiy stack frontend, backend va AI qatlamlariga bo'lingan.
reply.en: The core stack is split across frontend, backend, and AI layers.

reply.uz: Asosiy fokus mahsulotga yaqin web tizimlar, admin panellar, API va AI integratsiyalarida.
reply.en: The main focus is product-oriented web systems, admin panels, APIs, and AI integrations.

reply.uz: Portfolio bo'limi loyihalarni case-study usulida ko'rsatadi.
reply.en: The portfolio section presents projects in a case-study format.

reply.uz: Blog bo'limi dasturlash, tizimlar va amaliy tajriba yozuvlari uchun ishlatiladi.
reply.en: The blog is used for writing about programming, systems, and practical development work.

reply.uz: Muhokama bo'limi savol-javob va structured discussion oqimini qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.
reply.en: The discussions area supports Q&A and a more structured conversation flow.

reply.uz: Resume sahifasi tajriba, ko'nikmalar, ta'lim va yo'nalishni jamlaydi.
reply.en: The resume page brings together experience, skills, education, and working direction.

reply.uz: Bog'lanish uchun email va asosiy ijtimoiy kanallar mavjud.
reply.en: There is a direct email contact plus the main social channels.

reply.uz: Admin qismi kontentni sahifa ichidan boshqarish oqimiga ulangan.
reply.en: The admin area is connected to an in-page content management flow.
